name: German Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the baking chocolate with boiling water until melted.
2. Let mixture cool completely.
3. In a separate bowl, cream together butter and sugar replacement.
4. Add fructose and beat well.
5. Add egg yolks one at a time, beating after each addition.
6. Stir in vanilla extract.
7. Mix in the cooled chocolate water.
8. Sift baking soda and salt into a separate bowl.
9. Gradually add buttermilk to the chocolate mixture, alternating with the sifted dry ingredients, mixing well after each addition until smooth.
10. Gently fold in the beaten egg whites until just combined.
11. Grease three 3-inch (9 cm) baking pans.
12. Line each pan with parchment paper and grease again lightly.
13. Pour batter evenly into prepared pans.
14. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
15. Remove from pans and let cool on wire racks.
